title: intensely flavoured canadian spring onions soup
description: a rich and snappy soup that celebrates the flavors of spring onions on a cold canadian night

ingredients.name: dashi powder
ingredients.notes: make sure to use dashi powder made from vegetable or mushroom base for a no-onion-no-garlic-friendly option

ingredients.name: vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: use low-sodium broth to control salt intake

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: use high-quality, richly flavoured butter for best results

ingredients.name: white wine
ingredients.notes: optional, use for added depth of flavour

instructions: melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat
add the chopped spring onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes
add the potatoes, vegetable broth, dashi powder, and flour, and bring to a boil
reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until the potatoes are tender, about 15 minutes
use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth, or allow to cool and puree in a blender
return the soup to the pot and add the white wine and heavy cream, if using
season with salt to taste and serve hot
